properties.description: Front of Car enclosure
Rear of Car enclosure (formerly BBC)
High Voltage Battery enclosure
Safety Board PCB inside FOC
Central Compute Module PCB inside FOC
Raspberry Pi inside FOC
Ready to Drive Button switch on dashboard
Shutdown Circuit switch on dashboard
Dashboard emergency stop button
Dashboard LED indicator PCB inside FOC
Human Interface board inside FOC (6p only)
Human Interface board inside ROC (4p + 6p)
2-post LV master switch. Pin 1 = pre (power in), pin 2 = post (switched out)
Soldered speaker in ROC
Motor inverter inside HVB
Low voltage 24V battery
Front Left wheel speed / shock sensor
Front Right wheel speed / shock sensor
Rear Left wheel speed / shock sensor
Rear Right wheel speed / shock sensor
Tractive System Status Indicator / Light Tree (TSL unified)
Brake Over Travel Switch
Ready to Drive device in SDC chain (inside FOC)
Brake Pressure Sensor 1 (P51)
Brake Pressure Sensor 2 (P51)
Accelerator Pedal Position Sensor (includes throttle sensors)
FOC bulkhead 12p — ROC link. Internal: DT04-12PA-L012, External: DT06-12SA
FOC bulkhead 12p — footwell sensors (BPS + APPS). Internal: DT04-12PA-L012, External: DT06-12SA
FOC bulkhead 6p — TSSI and Brake Light. Internal: DT04-6P-L012, External: DT06-6S
FOC bulkhead 12p — wheel/shock sensors. External: DT06-12SA
FOC bulkhead 3p — current sensor chain to HVB
FOC bulkhead 2p — SDC out to BOTS
FOC bulkhead 6p — HVB link. BMS/IMD fault signals to HVB Safety Board header
Dashboard connector on FOC face
ROC bulkhead 12p — FOC link. Internal: DT04-12PA-L012, External: DT06-12SA
ROC bulkhead 6p — Estop/LV batt/ACCU. Internal: DT04-6P, External: DT06-6S
ROC bulkhead 2p — LV battery connector
HVB bulkhead 12p — main signal interface (formerly ACCU-C1)
HVB bulkhead 3p — current sensor
Safety Board SDC output header. Pin 1 = DNP (requires dummy pin). Pin 2 = SDC out
Safety Board estop header. Pin 1 = Estop In, Pin 2 = Estop Out
Tractive System On switch header. Reversible pinout.
Safety Board ACCU header. Pin 1 = SDC Out (to HVB), Pin 2 = GND, Pin 3 = IMD Fault, Pin 4 = BMS Fault
Pin 1 = 5V, Pin 2 = Current Sense Signal, Pin 3 = DNP, Pin 4 = GND
Pin 1 = 12V, Pin 2 = GND (low side switching)
Pin 1 = 12V, Pin 2 = 12V, Pin 3 = Green LED, Pin 4 = Red LED
Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = GND
Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = GND
Pin 1 = GND, Pin 2 = BSPD Fault LED, Pin 3 = BMS Fault LED, Pin 4 = IMD Fault LED
Ready to Drive Button header on Safety Board. Pin 1 = RTDB 5V, Pin 2 = RTDB Out
24V expansion header. Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = GND
5V expansion header. Pin 1 = 5V, Pin 2 = GND
Pin 1 = LED GND, Pin 2 = BSPD LED+, Pin 3 = BMS LED+, Pin 4 = IMD LED+
Safety Board RTD SDC header (inside FOC). Pin 1 = RTD In, Pin 2 = RTD Out
Safety Board header inside HVB. Pin 1 = 12V, Pin 2 = GND, Pin 3 = IMD Fault, Pin 4 = BMS Reset
Pin 1 = 12V, Pin 2 = GND
Pin 1 = BPS1, Pin 2 = APPS2, Pin 3 = BPS2, Pin 4 = APPS1
Pin 1 = LIN-POT4, Pin 2 = LIN-POT3, Pin 3 = LIN-POT2, Pin 4 = LIN-POT1
Pin 1 = Thermistor 2, Pin 2 = Thermistor 1, Pin 3 = GND, Pin 4 = GND
Pin 1 = Thermistor 4, Pin 2 = Thermistor 3, Pin 3 = GND, Pin 4 = GND
Pin 1 = GPIO2, Pin 2 = GPIO1, Pin 3 = GND, Pin 4 = GND
Pin 1 = GPIO4, Pin 2 = GPIO3, Pin 3 = GND, Pin 4 = GND
Pin 1 = Ready to Drive Button, Pin 2 = Brake Light
Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = Pump 1
Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = Pump 2
Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = Fan PWM, Pin 3 = GND, Pin 4 = DNP
Pin 1 = 24V, Pin 2 = GND
Pin 1 = CAN L, Pin 2 = CAN H
Pin 1 = CAN L, Pin 2 = CAN H
CCM speaker output header. Pin 1 = Speaker+, Pin 2 = Speaker-

CCM 20p footwell header. Pin 1=TSSI bypass, Pin 2=Latch/TSSI status feedback, Pin 3=Speaker, Pin 4=GND, Pin 5=BPS1 post-LPF, Pin 6=BPS2 post-LPF, Pin 7=3V3, Pin 8=APPS1 post-LPF, Pin 9=APPS2 post-LPF, Pin 10=24V, Pin 11=RTDB, Pin 12=GND, Pin 13=5V, Pin 14=WS/Shock 1, Pin 15=WS/Shock 2, Pin 16=WS/Shock 3, Pin 17=WS/Shock 4, Pin 18=DNP, Pin 19=Brake Light, Pin 20=12V
CCM latch/reset header. Pin 1=12V, Pin 2=IMD Reset+, Pin 4=GND, Pin 7=BSPD Reset-, Pin 8=IMD Reset-, Pin 9=BMS Reset-, Pin 10=BMS LED+, Pin 11=IMD LED+, Pin 12=BSPD LED+
PDB header. Pin 1 = LV MS-
Raspberry Pi power input (micro USB)
Raspberry Pi USB A port 1 — to CAN Transceiver
Raspberry Pi USB A port 2 — to Cell Box
USB connection from RPi
PLACEHOLDER — unconnected CAN port on transceiver
USB connection from RPi
Pin 1 = GND, Pin 2 = GND, Pin 3 = 12V, Pin 4 = BSPD LED, Pin 5 = IMD LED, Pin 6 = BMS LED
Pin 1 = BSPD Reset, Pin 2 = IMD Reset, Pin 3 = BMS Reset, Pin 4 = IMD Reset
Pin 1 = GND, Pin 2 = GND, Pin 3 = 12V, Pin 4 = BSPD LED, Pin 5 = IMD LED, Pin 6 = BMS LED
Pin 1 = HV MS+, Pin 2 = HV MS-
Pin 1 = LV MS pre (power in), Pin 2 = LV MS post (switched out)
Pin 1 = Speaker+, Pin 2 = Speaker-
Inverter LV interface connector (AMPSEAL 23p)
LV Battery positive ring terminal
LV Battery negative ring terminal
Wheel speed sensor FL connector
Motor sensor connector (Souriau UTS6JC12E14PW). Lettered pins A-L.
RLS RM44SI encoder connector on motor. Lettered pins A-L.
4p Deutsch on TSSI/light tree device
3p Deutsch on brake light device
BOTS SDC connector. Pin 1 = SDC in (BOTS out to next), Pin 2 = SDC in (BOTS in from prev)
Inertia Switch 3-pin connector
Ready to Drive SDC connector. Pin 1 = RTD in (BOTS out), Pin 2 = RTD out (to ES-CKP)
Estop Left SDC connector. Pin 1 = in, Pin 2 = out
Estop Right SDC connector. Pin 1 = in, Pin 2 = out
Estop Cockpit SDC connector. Pin 1 = in, Pin 2 = out
P51 BPS1 sensor connector. Pin 1 = 5V, Pin 2 = GND, Pin 3 = Signal
P51 BPS2 sensor connector. Pin 1 = 5V, Pin 2 = GND, Pin 3 = Signal
APPS 6p Metri-Pack connector (12162260)
ROC bulkhead 6p — SDC chain interface (formerly BBC-C1)
Tractive System Light connector 1 — from HVB/FOC
APPS throttle sensors 1+2 footwell connector female side (6-pin). Pins 1-3 = THRS1 (3V3, GND, OUT), Pins 4-6 = THRS2 (3V3, GND, OUT)

CCM 14p Molex service break to footwell sensors. Pin 2=THRS2 GND, Pin 3=THRS1 GND, Pin 4=THRS1 3V3, Pin 5=BPS2 GND, Pin 6=BPS1 GND, Pin 7=BPS1 5V, Pin 9=THRS2 OUT, Pin 10=THRS1 OUT, Pin 11=THRS2 3V3, Pin 12=BPS2 OUT, Pin 13=BPS1 OUT, Pin 14=BPS2 5V
Safety Board current sensor header. Pin 1=5V, Pin 2=Current Signal, Pin 3=DNP, Pin 4=GND
Current sensor device connector inside HVB (placeholder)
HI Board ROC — LED signals. Pin 1=LED GND, Pin 2=BSPD LED+, Pin 3=BMS LED+, Pin 4=IMD LED+
12V splice node for accumulator power (EXT 1 MZ)
12V splice node for inverter power (EXT 1 MZ)
GND splice node for inverter (EXT 1 MZ)
Shutdown Circuit signal
Ready to Drive Button signal
Ready to Move Light signal
